question: React 19 mein `forwardRef` ke baare mein kya badla hai?
options: forwardRef aur bhi required ho gaya
forwardRef completely remove ho gaya, ab ref directly prop ki tarah pass hota hai
forwardRef ka naam refForward ho gaya
forwardRef sirf class components mein kaam karta hai

question: React 19 mein `use()` hook kya karta hai?
options: Sirf custom hooks banane ke liye
Promise aur Context dono ko conditionally read karne deta hai

question: React 19 mein `` ko provider ki tarah kaise use karte hain?
explanation:
React 19 mein ab likhne ki zaroorat nahi. Aap seedha likh sakte ho. Yeh cleaner syntax hai.

const
 
ThemeContext = createContext('light');
// React
 
18
<ThemeContext.Provider value="dark">
<App
 
/>
</ThemeContext.Provider>
// React
 
19
 
n

<ThemeContext value="dark">
<App
 
/>
</ThemeContext>

n
 
Real Life: Puri app mein dark/light mode context wrap karna — naya syntax zyada readable aur concise hai.

question: React 19 mein `useOptimistic` hook ka main purpose kya hai?
options: UI ko optimistically update karna jab async operation chal raha ho
Component ko optimize karna re-renders ke liye

question: `useFormStatus` hook kahan se import karte hain React 19 mein?
`useState` mein functional update kab use karni chahiye?
options: Jab naya state purane state par depend karta ho

question: `useEffect` ki dependency array mein empty array `[]` dene ka matlab kya hai?
options: Effect sirf mount pe chalega, unmount pe cleanup

question: Niche diya code ka output kya hoga? `const [state, setState] = useState({name: 'Raj', age: 25});` `setState({name: 'Priya'});`
`useContext` re-render kab trigger karta hai?
options: Jab koi bhi parent re-render ho
Jab context ki value change ho
Sirf jab component ke props change hoo
Kabhi nahi, context re-render nahi karta

question: `useEffect` mein cleanup function kab return karna zaroori hai?
options: Jab bhi side effect ke baad resources clean karne ho (subscriptions, timers, event listeners)

question: `useRef` aur `useState` mein kya fark hai?
options: Koi fark nahi dono same hain
useRef change hone par re-render nahi karta, useState karta hai
useRef sirf DOM elements ke liye hai

question: `useMemo` ka use kab karna chahiye?
options: Sirf jab expensive calculation ho aur dependencies change na hoo
Event handlers memoize karne ke liye
explanation:
useMemo ek memoized value return karta hai. Use tabhi karo jab calculation genuinely expensive ho (sorting,
filtering large arrays). Chhoti calculations pe useMemo lagana overhead add karta hai.

const
 
expensiveResult = useMemo(() =>
 
{
// Yeh sirf tab recalculate hoga jab products
 
ya filterText
 
change
 
ho
return products
.filter(p
 
=> p.name.includes(filterText))
.sort((a,
 
b) => a.price - b.price);
}, [products, filterText]);
// DON'T
 
do this — unnecessary
const
 
name = useMemo(() => user.firstName
 
+
 
'
 
'
 
+
 
user.lastName,
[user]);
 
// Simple string join ke liye useMemo overkill
 
hai

n
 
Real Life: Amazon jaisi site mein 10,000 products filter karna — useMemo se sirf filter text change hone par
recalculate hoga.

question: `useCallback` aur `useMemo` mein kya farq hai?
options: useCallback function memoize karta hai, useMemo value memoize karta hai
useCallback sirf event handlers ke liye

question: `useRef` se previous state value kaise store karte hain?
options: useRef ka koi use nahi is case mein
useEffect mein ref.current ko state se update karo render ke baad

question: Ek component mein sirf ek useRef ho sakta hai?
options: Nahi, multiple useRef use kar sakte hai
Ref sirf class components mein use hota hai

question: `useReducer` kab prefer karna chahiye `useState` ke upar?
options: Jab state logic complex ho aur multiple sub-values hon ya state transitions rules-based ho
Sirf Redux use karne ke liye

question: `useReducer` mein `dispatch` function kya karta hai?
options: Reducer function ko action ke saath call karta hai aur state update karta hai

question: `useReducer` ki initial state lazy initialize kaise karte hain?
Kya `useReducer` se `dispatch` function ka reference stable hota hai?
options: Nahi, har render pe naya dispatch milta hai
Haan, React guarantee deta hai dispatch kabhi nahi badlega
Sirf tab jab state nahi badle
useMemo ke saath hi stable hota hai

question: `useState` vs `useReducer` — performance mein kya fark hai?
options: Performance difference minimal hai, choice architecture par depend karta hai

question: `useTransition` hook kya problem solve karta hai?
options: Async API calls ko handle karta hai
UI ko responsive rakhta hai by marking some state updates as non-urgent

question: `useDeferredValue` aur `useTransition` mein kya fark hai?
options: useDeferredValue value defer karta hai, useTransition state update defer karta hai. useDeferredValue tab use karo jab parent se value aaye.
useTransition React 18 mein tha, useDeferredValue React 19 mein naya hai

question: `useTransition` se `isPending` flag ka kya matlab hai?
options: Transition state update abhi pending hai — complete nahi hua
explanation:
isPending true hota hai jab startTransition ke andar wrapped update abhi complete nahi hua. Is time user ko loading indicator dikhao. const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition(); // isPending ka use {isPending && (
)} // Ya opacity se indicate karo
n Real Life: Tab switching mein — current tab ka content thoda fade karo jab naya tab load ho raha ho.

question: Kya `startTransition` ke andar `async` function use kar sakte hain? (React 19)
options: Haan, React 19 mein async functions support hai startTransition mei

question: `useDeferredValue` se kya guarantee milti hai?
options: Deferred value eventually consistent ho jaayegi urgent updates ke baad

question: `useId` hook kab use karte hain?
options: Unique list keys generate karne ke liye
Accessibility ke liye stable unique IDs banane ke liye jo server aur client mein match karei
Database IDs generate karne ke liye

question: `useImperativeHandle` kya karta hai?
options: Parent ko child ka poora DOM expose karta hai
Parent ko child ke specific methods/values expose karta hai ref ke through
Child component ko parent ka DOM access deta hai
Sirf class components mein use hota hai

question: `useImperativeHandle` kab use karna chahiye?
options: Jab parent ko child ke specific imperative actions trigger karni hoon (focus, scroll, play)

question: Custom hook banana kab zaroori hai?
options: Jab component 100 lines se bada ho
Jab same stateful logic multiple components mein reuse karni ho

question: Custom hook ka naam kis se shuru hona chahiye?
explanation:
'use' prefix React ke liye convention nahi, rule hai. React lint rules check karte hain ki hooks 'use' se shuru hon —
isse React jan sakta hai ki yeh ek hook hai aur rules apply kare.

// Sahi naming
 
n

function
 
useLocalStorage(key, initialValue)
 
{
 
...
 
}
function
 
useDebounce(value, delay) { ... }
function
 
useOnlineStatus() { ... }
function
 
useWindowSize() { ... }
// Galat
 
naming
 
7
 
— React hook rules apply
 
nahi honge
function
 
fetchData() { useState... } //
 
Warning
 
aayega
function
 
localStorageHelper() { useEffect... } //
 
Bug
 
prone

n
 
Real Life: ESLint react-hooks plugin 'use' prefix check karta hai — team mein consistency ke liye naming
convention follow karo.

question: Custom hook se kya return karna chahiye?
options: Jo bhi useful ho — value, array, object, function, ya kuch nahi

question: `useLocalStorage` custom hook mein kya problem aa sakti hai SSR mein?
options: Server pe `window` aur `localStorage` available nahi hote — error aayega
SSR mein hooks work nahi karte

question: React 19 mein form `action` prop kya accept karta hai?
options: String URL ya async function dono

question: `useActionState` hook (React 19) kya karta hai?
options: Form action ke state, error, aur pending ko manage karta hai
Sirf server mein use hota hai

question: React 19 mein Server Actions ko client component mein kaise use karte hain?
options: Props ke through pass karke ya module import se
Sirf server components mein possible hai

question: `React.memo` kya karta hai?
options: useMemo jaisa hai, values memoize karta hai
Component ko wrap karta hai — sirf tab re-render karta hai jab props change hoo
Component ko lazy load karta hai
Component ki state memoize karta hai

question: `React.lazy()` aur `Suspense` saath kaise kaam karte hain?
options: React.lazy() immediately component load karta hai
React.lazy() dynamic import se component late load karta hai, Suspense fallback dikhata hai loading mei
Suspense error handling ke liye hai
Dono sirf SSR mein kaam karte hain

question: `Suspense` nested karne ka kya faida hai?
options: Different loading boundaries set kar sakte ho — different parts ke alag fallbacks
Error boundary ka kaam karta hai

question: `ErrorBoundary` Suspense ke saath kab use karte hain?
options: Jab lazy component load fail ho ya data fetch fail ho — error catch karne ke liye

question: React 19 mein `use(promise)` Suspense ke saath kaise kaam karta hai?
options: Promise manually resolve karna padhta hai
use() promise pending mein Suspense fallback dikhata hai, resolve hone par data milta hai
Sirf rejected promises handle karta hai
use() Suspense ke bina kaam karta hai
explanation:
use(promise) call karo — jab tak promise pending hai Suspense fallback dikhega. Resolve hone par component render hoga data ke saath. Reject hone par ErrorBoundary catch karega. // Data fetch function (Server Component ya parent mein) const userPromise = fetch('/api/user').then(r => r.json()); // Client Component function UserProfile({ userPromise }) { const user = use(userPromise); // Suspends until resolved return

Hello, {user.name}!

; } // Parent wrap karo }> n Real Life: Profile page load karna — skeleton dikhao jab tak data aaye, error page dikhao agar API fail ho. SECTION 10: React Performance Optimization

question: React mein unnecessary re-renders kab hote hain?
options: State ya props change hone par, ya parent re-render hone par (even if props same hoon)

question: React DevTools mein performance profiling kaise karte hain?
options: React DevTools ke Profiler tab mein Record karo aur flame graph dekho

question: `key` prop ka React performance mein kya role hai?
options: React ko batata hai ki element same hai ya naya — reconciliation optimize karta hai

question: React 19 mein React Compiler kya karta hai?
options: JSX ko TypeScript mein compile karta hai
Automatically memoization add karta hai — useMemo/useCallback manually likhne ki zaroorat kam ho jaati hai
explanation:
React Compiler (pehle React Forget tha) code analyze karke automatically memoization add karta hai. Aapko har
jagah useMemo/useCallback nahi likhna padega — compiler sahi jagah pe khud lagata hai.

// React
 
Compiler ke bina — manually optimize
const
 
expensiveValue = useMemo(() => compute(a,
 
b),
 
[a,
 
b]);
const
 
stableHandler = useCallback(() =>
 
handle(id),
 
[id]);
// React
 
Compiler ke saath — compiler
 
yeh
 
kaam khud
 
karta
 
hai
// Normal
 
code likho, compiler optimize
 
karega:
const
 
expensiveValue = compute(a, b);
 
// Compiler
 
memoize
 
karega
const
 
stableHandler = () => handle(id);
 
// Compiler
 
stable
 
reference
 
dega

n
 
Real Life: React 19 + Compiler use karne wale codebases mein boilerplate memoization code significantly
kam ho gaya.

question: Virtualization kab use karni chahiye React mein?
options: Jab list mein 100+ items hon jinhe sab ek saath render karna performance issue create kare

question: Context API kab use karni chahiye aur kab nahi?
options: Hamesha use karo state ke liye
Global ya widely shared state ke liye (theme, auth, language) — local state ke liye useState prefer karo

question: Context mein value object hone par performance optimize kaise karte hain?
options: useMemo se context value memoize karo taaki unnecessary re-renders na ho

question: Context split karne ka kya faida hai?
options: Different update frequencies alag karne se unnecessary re-renders kam hote hai
Sirf large apps mein useful hai

question: `ReactDOM.createPortal` kab use karte hain?
options: Jab component ko DOM hierarchy se bahar render karna ho (modals, tooltips, dropdowns)

question: Error Boundary class component kyun hona chahiye, function component nahi?
options: getDerivedStateFromError aur componentDidCatch abhi tak sirf class components mein available hai
Hooks error boundaries support karte hai

question: React 19 mein `preload` aur `preinit` kya hain?
options: Browser ko resources preload karne ke hints dene ke liye React 19 ke naye APIs hai

question: React 19 mein title, meta aur link tags component mein kaise manage karte hain?
options: React 19 mein directly component mein likhne par React automatically document head mein move karta hai
Next.js sirf yeh kar sakta hai
explanation:
React 19 mein Document Metadata Support aaya. Aap component ke andar , etc. likh sakte ho — React khud inhe mein move kar dega. react-helmet ki zaroorat nahi. // React 19 n — react-helmet nahi chahiye function BlogPost({ post }) { return (
{post.title} | My Blog

{post.title}

{post.content}

); } // React yeh sab automatically mein daal dega n Real Life: SEO ke liye dynamic page titles — har blog post ka alag title aur description, React manage karega. SECTION 14: Hooks Rules & Common Patterns

question: Hooks ke bare mein kaunsa rule sabse important hai?
options: Hooks sirf class components mein use karo
Hooks ko conditionally ya loops mein call mat karo — hamesha top level par call karo
Ek component mein sirf 3 hooks use karo
Hooks ko export karna zaroori hai

question: Kya hooks ko nested functions ya callbacks mein call kar sakte hain?
options: Nahi — hooks sirf function component ke top level mein ya custom hooks mein call hone chahiye

question: `useEffect` mein missing dependency warning kab aati hai?
options: Jab effect ke andar use ki gayi values dependency array mein listed na hoo

question: `useLayoutEffect` aur `useEffect` mein kya fark hai?
options: useLayoutEffect DOM update ke baad lekin browser paint se pehle synchronously chalta hai
useLayoutEffect server pe bhi chalta hai

question: Render Props pattern kya hai?
options: Ek technique jahan component ek function prop accept karta hai jo render karne ki responsibility deta hai

question: Compound Component pattern kya hota hai?
options: Parent component ki state share karne wale related components ka set — Context use karke

question: Higher-Order Component (HOC) kya hai?
options: Ek function jo component le aur enhanced component return kare
kya hai? A) Sirf class components ke liye n B) Ek function jo component le aur enhanced component return kare C) React Router ka feature

question: `React.StrictMode` kya karta hai production mein?
options: StrictMode sirf development mein kaam karta hai, production mein koi effect nahi
explanation:
StrictMode development-only tool hai. Yeh components ko double render karta hai side effects detect karne ke
liye, deprecated APIs warn karta hai. Production build mein completely inactive hota hai.

// index.js / main.jsx
root.render(
<React.StrictMode>
<App
 
/>
</React.StrictMode>
);
// Development mein StrictMode:
// 1.
 
Components 2x render karta hai (side effect
 
bugs
 
dhundhne
 
ke
 
liye)
// 2.
 
Effects 2x run karte hain (mount
 
→
 
unmount
 
→
 
remount)
// 3.
 
Deprecated lifecycle methods warn
 
karta
 
hai

// 4.
 
Unexpected side effects identify karta hai
// Production mein: Koi difference nahi, zero
 
overhead

n
 
Real Life: useEffect cleanup theek se nahi likha — StrictMode double mount karne par bug immediately visible
ho jaata hai.

question: `useDebugValue` kab use karte hain?
options: Custom hooks mein — React DevTools mein hook ka debug label dikhane ke liye

question: React mein `key` prop change karne par kya hota hai?
options: Component completely unmount aur re-mount hota hai — fresh state ke saath

question: Controlled vs Uncontrolled components mein kya fark hai?
options: Controlled — React state form data manage karta hai. Uncontrolled — DOM khud manage karta hai (useRef se access)
Uncontrolled better performance dete hain hamesha
Controlled sirf class components mein hote hain

question: `defaultProps` React 19 mein kya hua?
options: Function components mein deprecated hai — default parameters use karo

question: React mein `reconciliation` kya hai?
options: Virtual DOM aur real DOM compare karke minimum changes apply karna
explanation:
Reconciliation React ka algorithm hai — naya Virtual DOM purane se compare karta hai (diffing) aur sirf zaruri DOM changes apply karta hai. Yahi React ki efficiency ka secret hai. // React Virtual DOM diff karta hai // Before:
  • Apple
  • Banana
// After state change:
  • Apple
  • Banana
  • Cherry
    • // Sirf yeh naya DOM node add hoga
// Key ka role — list reordering mein // Bina key — React sab re-render karta hai // Saath key — React sirf moved/added items handle karta hai n Real Life: 100 item list mein ek item add karo — reconciliation se sirf ek DOM node add hoga, 100 re-render nahi honge.

question: `React.Fragment` kab use karte hain?
options: Multiple elements return karne ke liye bina extra DOM node banaye

question: React mein `children` prop kya hota hai?
options: Component ke opening aur closing tags ke beech ka content — string, element, array, function kuch bhi ho sakta hai

question: `React.cloneElement` kab use karte hain?
options: Existing element ko clone karke extra props inject karne ke liye
explanation:
cloneElement existing React element ka copy banata hai naye props ke saath merge karke. Compound components aur render props patterns mein use hota hai. function Toolbar({ children }) { return (
{React.Children.map(children, child => React.cloneElement(child, { // Har child button ko theme prop inject karo theme: 'dark', size: 'sm' }) )}
); } // theme='dark', size='sm' mil jaayega // theme='dark', size='sm' mil jaayega n Real Life: Form component — har child input ko required prop automatically inject karo, har input mein manually likhne ki zaroorat nahi.

question: React mein synthetic events kya hain?
options: React ka cross-browser wrapper native browser events ke upar — consistent API deta hai

question: React mein `PropTypes` ka kya role hai?
options: Runtime type checking — development mein props ki type validate karta hai warnings ke saath

question: React mein hooks install karne ki zaroorat kab hoti hai?
options: React ke built-in hooks (useState, useEffect etc.) install nahi karte — react package mein hain. Extra libraries sirf advanced use cases ke liye install karte hain.
Har project mein react-use install karo

question: `@tanstack/react-query` (React Query) kya problem solve karta hai?
options: Server state management — data fetching, caching, background refetch, loading/error states automatically

question: `Zustand` kya hai aur React Context se kaise alag hai?
options: Minimal state management library — Context se simple, Redux se simpler, performance better

question: `react-hook-form` kya faida deta hai?
options: Uncontrolled inputs par based form management — less re-renders, better performance, validation built-i

question: `SWR` library kya hai?
options: Stale-While-Revalidate — data fetching hook library by Vercel, cached data pehle dikhao phir background mein fresh data fetch karo

question: React 19 mein `ref` cleanup function kya hai?
options: Ref callback se ek function return kar sakte hain jo element DOM se remove hone par call hoga

question: React 19 mein `hydration` errors kaise improve hue hain?
options: React 19 better error messages deta hai — exact diff dikhata hai server aur client HTML ka

question: `useOptimistic` mein rollback kaise hota hai?
options: Jab async action fail ho toh React automatically original state restore karta hai

question: React 19 mein `createRoot` mein kya new options aaye?
options: `onCaughtError`, `onUncaughtError`, `onRecoverableError` callbacks aaye hain better error handling ke liye

question: React mein `Concurrent Mode` ka React 19 mein kya status hai?
options: React 18 se default hai, React 19 mein aur mature — createRoot use karne par automatic

question: React components test karne ke liye sabse popular library kaunsi hai?
`act()` React testing mein kab use karte hain?
options: Jab state updates aur DOM changes properly flush karni hon test mei

question: React mein hooks ko test kaise karte hain directly?
options: Jest directly call karta hai hooks

question: React Router v6 mein `useNavigate` kaise use karte hain?
options: useNavigate hook se navigate function milta hai jo programmatic navigation karta hai

question: React Router mein `useParams` kya return karta hai?
React Router v6 mein nested routes kaise define karte hain?
options: Sirf parent mein route define karo
Parent Route ke andar child Routes + `` use karo child render karne ke liye
Nested routing v6 mein possible nahi

question: React mein `batch updates` kya hain?
options: Multiple renders ko ek mein combine karna
React 18+ mein multiple setState calls ek re-render mein batch hote hain — unnecessary re-renders avoid
Sirf event handlers mein hota hai

question: `React.lazy` ke saath dynamic import ka syntax kya hai?
React mein `Portal` mein event bubbling kaise kaam karta hai?
options: Portal mein events bubble nahi karte
Portal DOM hierarchy se bahar ho lekin React tree hierarchy se bubble karta hai — parent component mein events milte hai
Sirf DOM hierarchy follow karta hai

question: React mein `useEffect` ke andar async function kaise likhte hain?
options: Andar ek async function define karo aur call karo — ya IIFE use karo

question: `useCallback` kab actually helpful nahi hota?
options: Jab child component React.memo use nahi karta — useCallback ka koi faida nahi

question: React mein `Object.is` comparison kab relevant hai?
options: React state comparisons mein — useState/useEffect dependencies Object.is se compare hoti hai

question: React 19 mein `` action aur React Server Actions ka kya connection hai?
options: Form action prop mein Server Action function pass karo — directly server par run hoga, API route nahi chahiye

question: React DevTools se kya-kya inspect kar sakte hain?
options: Component tree, props, state, hooks values, context, profiling, renders count

question: React mein `flushSync` kab use karte hain?
options: Jab React batching bypass karni ho aur immediate synchronous DOM update chahiye

question: React 19 mein `Suspense` list ka kya improvement hua?
options: List ke items gradually reveal ho sakte hain — SuspenseList jaisi functionality improve hui

question: React mein `prop drilling` kya hai aur solutions kya hain?
options: Props ko bahut deeply nested components tak pass karna — solution: Context, composition, ya state management

question: React mein `Controlled Input` mein cursor jump problem kab hoti hai aur fix kya hai?
options: Jab value prop asynchronously update ho ya case normalize ho — solution: state sync rakhna

question: React mein `reconciler` aur `renderer` mein kya fark hai?
options: Reconciler changes dhundhta hai (virtual DOM diff), renderer actual output pe apply karta hai (DOM, Native, etc.)
Renderer React ka purana naam tha

question: Interview mein pucha: React 19 ka sabse important naya feature kya hai apke opinion mein aur kyun?
options: Actions aur async transitions — form handling aur loading states ka complexity dramatically reduce hua, real-world apps ke liye most impactful
